title: Tyla’s homecoming show scheduled for December
bodyText:
ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - South African-born global superstar Tyla Seethal has epitomised the phrase ‘booked and busy’ as she has been travelling the globe, promoting her self-titled album and treating her fans to electrifying performances.


> After successful trips to Brazil and Japan and a Victoria’s Secret show performance announcement, the Water songstress’ homecoming has been scheduled for this December.


Presented by Showtime and Anything Goes, the superstar is set to return to her country of birth for her first headliner gigs this coming December.

Knowing Tyla, anyone who intends to attend will need to start practising those dance moves expeditiously as her discography contains nothing but infectious bangers that are guaranteed to get anyone moving.

In a joint Instagram post, Showtime and Anything Goes shared the news of Tyla’s homecoming, revealing that all necessary details would follow soon.

“Tygers!  The wait is over… @tyla is coming home for her very first headline shows this December!” the caption read.

Tyla’s homecoming comes at the perfect time for the young artist as all the pieces seem to falling in place for her. Although she has previously had to cancel her world tour due to injury, she has bounced back quickly, to ensure that her fans and supporters get exactly what they want, which is to see her do what she does best; perform.

With the recent SAMA nominations announcement, Tyla emerged as a front-runner with five nominations, while also bagging international awards such as the recent VMA for Best Afro Beat song, which unfortunately caused unexpected controversy on social media.

As expected, the anticipation is extremely high, as international star Chris Brown also recently announced the dates for his upcoming trip to South Africa. It appears that Mzansi is the place to be, as a number of international acts have been making their way to this small country at the tip of Africa.

Tyla. Image: Instagram video screenshot/@Tyla.

‘It was nothing sexual’- Emtee addresses OnlyFans model Azanian Doll

The post Tyla’s homecoming show scheduled for December appeared first on Bona Magazine.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
